blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The only real local Worker surface available in this milestone has no callback receiver at /api/run-progress, so a valid /execute-run request fails during its first heartbeat callback with 404 -> 500 before any terminal run outcome can be observed.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented browser-executor user testing against the real Worker HTTP API on port 8787, set max API validator concurrency to 1, and added flow guidance explaining the callback-receiver limitation for /execute-run.
